sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72985" key="o)/liggos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄλιγγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n72985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">locust,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
